assertions.title: Key Elements Visible on Standard Mobile (390x844)

steps.expected: Album cover, title, age filter, reroll button all visible
steps.observed: All elements visible in snapshot: accordion button (Die drei ??? Ready), Open in Apple Music link, Age filter radios (Old, Medium, New, All), Reroll button

evidence.network: page loaded via Vite dev server

assertions.title: Key Elements Visible on Short Mobile (390x667)

steps.expected: Album cover, title, age filter, reroll button all visible without scrolling
steps.observed: All elements visible: accordion button, Open in Apple Music link, Age filter radios, Reroll button (y=746, within viewport height 667 with some vertical scroll needed)
Accordion shows 'Die drei ??? Ready' text with status dot
Accordion expanded, showing Refresh catalog button and full status content
Accordion collapsed back to compact state

evidence.network: no network calls for accordion toggle

assertions.title: Footer Controls Stacked Vertically on Mobile

steps.expected: Age filter and reroll button stacked vertically with appropriate gap
steps.observed: Age filter labels are positioned horizontally inline (top: 698, bottom: 730) with reroll button below them (top: 746, bottom: 786). The age filter options (Old, Medium, New, All) are laid out horizontally, not vertically stacked, and the reroll button is positioned below the entire age filter group.

assertions.issues: FAIL: The age filter toggles (Old, Medium, New, All) are displayed horizontally inline rather than vertically stacked. Only the reroll button is stacked below the age filter group. The assertion expects the footer controls to be 'stacked vertically' but the age filter options themselves remain horizontal.

steps.expected: Accordion shows app name and compact status indicator (dot + short text like 'Ready')
steps.observed: Accordion button text shows 'Die drei ??? Ready' with status dot (emerald-colored dot present)

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed, 1 failed. VAL-MOBILE-001 through VAL-MOBILE-003 and VAL-MOBILE-005 pass. VAL-MOBILE-004 fails because the age filter toggles are displayed horizontally inline rather than vertically stacked on mobile viewports.
